summary: OpenWeatherMap provides current and forecasted weather data through its API, allowing developers to access weather information for various locations worldwide.

steps.title: Create an OpenWeatherMap Account
steps.description: Go to openweathermap.org and sign up for a free account using your work email.
steps.screenshot_hint: You should see the OpenWeatherMap dashboard with a navigation menu at the top.
steps.expected_result: You are logged into the OpenWeatherMap dashboard.

steps.title: Generate an API Key
steps.description: Navigate to the API keys section and generate a new key.
steps.screenshot_hint: You should see a list of your API keys, including the newly generated one.
steps.expected_result: You have a new API key listed in the API keys section.

common_errors.fix: Your API key is invalid or has been revoked. Generate a new one from the API keys settings page.
You have exceeded the request limit for your API key. Consider upgrading to a paid plan or optimizing your requests.

pricing_info: OpenWeatherMap free tier: 60 calls/minute. Paid plans start at $15/month for 500,000 calls.
